name: Gopher
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN42 using the live Gopher subnet documentation and source repository. Native chain identity currently reports a placeholder name, so this remains an explicit identity-drift entry rather than a silent rename. The project website/API/app hosts were not promoted because they did not return safe public probe responses during review.

gap_notes: Native chain name currently reports as a placeholder.
No verified machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger schema yet.
No verified safe public subnet API endpoint yet.
No verified standalone static data artifact yet.

surfaces.name: Gopher subnet documentation
surfaces.notes: Public Gopher subnet documentation. The docs identify the subnet as mainnet netuid 42 and link miner setup to the subnet source repository.

surfaces.notes: Public source repository for Gopher Subnet 42 neuron logic.
